phoneSyncSpace.title: Phone Sync Space
phoneSyncSpace.desc: View files synced to your computer and their upload sources
phoneSyncSpace.desktopDeletedMessage: This file was deleted from the computer.

remoteAccess.title: Remote Access
remoteAccess.desc: Browse your computer's shared directory and download files
remoteAccess.shareFailedMessage: Could not open the system share sheet. Please try again later.

emptyState.title: No Content Yet
emptyState.message: Files will appear here once syncing is complete.

deviceUnavailable.title: Device Unavailable
deviceUnavailable.message: Please connect to a device first.

directoryInaccessible.title: Directory Inaccessible
directoryInaccessible.message: Please check the desktop app settings.

personalUnauthorized.title: Personal Shared Folder Unavailable
personalUnauthorized.message: Make sure the phone and desktop app are signed in to the same account, then configure the personal shared folder on desktop.

remoteWakeSetupRequired.title: Remote Wake Setup Required
remoteWakeSetupRequired.message: This phone is not on the desktop network. If the desktop is asleep, enable Remote Wake in Settings or switch back to the same Wi-Fi.

dialogs.downloadFailedMessage: Could not download the file. Please try again later.
dialogs.downloadUnavailableMessage: The file does not exist or is no longer accessible.
dialogs.previewUnsupportedMessage: This file type cannot be previewed yet. Download it first, then open it with another app.
dialogs.savedLocationDocuments: iOS Files App -> Vivi Drop folder
